crm.notes: Leads are manually added; basic tagging via a 'Source' column.

email.limitations: No advanced conditional routing; API available for basic actions.

task_manager.usage: Follow-up tasks created manually after meetings.

forms.data_flow: Email notifications arrive for new submissions; exports to CSV for bulk imports.

calendar.usage: Client meetings, webinars, and content publishing reminders.

notes: Currently cross-posting social content manually from the content calendar. Newsletter assembled weekly using curated links and recent content.
